name: ai-collaborative-development-preflight
description: Standardizes the AI-assisted development preflight workflow. Before implementation, AI should clarify requirements, ask questions, lock decisions, check risks, design architecture, and define acceptance criteria.

interface.longDescription: Standardizes the AI-assisted development preflight workflow. Before writing any code, AI clarifies requirements, asks structured questions, locks decisions, checks risks, designs architecture, and defines acceptance criteria. Supports 15-step workflow with round-by-round confirmation.
defaultPrompt: 我想做一个项目，帮我先梳理需求
Review this project and suggest improvements
Turn my idea into a development spec
